Your Agile CRM tenant subdomain

HTTPS-only REST API for managing contacts, companies, deals (opportunities), campaigns, tasks, events, notes, tracks, tickets, and documents in Agile CRM. Authentication is HTTP Basic with account email as username and REST client API key as password.

Contact Support:
 Name: Agile CRM
